name: Gyrodyne, LLC
summary: Gyrodyne, LLC is a New York limited liability company managing a portfolio of medical office and industrial properties in Suffolk and Westchester Counties, New York. Its primary assets are Flowerfield (63 acres in St. James, including a 135,000 sq ft industrial park) and Cortlandt Manor (13.8 acres including the 31,000 sq ft Cortlandt Medical Center). The company pursues entitlements to enhance property values and intends to dissolve after disposing of all real estate assets and distributing proceeds to shareholders.
